qa_pairs.question: What will be the username for my PostgreSQL account?
qa_pairs.answer: Your PostgreSQL account username will be the same as your Alliance username.

qa_pairs.question: How is the name of my PostgreSQL database determined?
qa_pairs.answer: The name of your PostgreSQL database will typically be "<username>_db," where "<username>" is your Alliance username.

qa_pairs.question: Am I able to create my own PostgreSQL database?
qa_pairs.answer: No, you cannot create your own PostgreSQL database.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process if I need more than one PostgreSQL database?
qa_pairs.answer: If you require more than one PostgreSQL database, you should send a request to Technical support.
